brand_identity.name: PlacementAI
brand_identity.mission: Connecting talent with opportunity through AI precision.

theme.glass_card_style: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-xl shadow-blue-900/5 rounded-2xl

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and card titles.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and table data.

primary.name: Royal Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights

accent.name: Success Teal
accent.usage: High match scores, success toasts, verified badges

gradients.primary_action: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-violet-600 hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-violet-700 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25

buttons.primary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 active:scale-95
buttons.glass: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/60 text-slate-800 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-white/80 hover:shadow-md

cards.default: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/50 rounded-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-indigo-500/10 transition-all duration-300
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6 h-full flex flex-col

inputs.style: h-11 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 rounded-xl transition-all

theme.tooltip: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-slate-100 shadow-xl rounded-lg text-slate-700

landing_page.structure: Grid of glass cards with varying spans. Hero section uses large typography with 3D/abstract imagery.
landing_page.hero_section: Split layout: Left text (H1 + CTA), Right 3D/Image. Background: Animated gradient mesh.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (glass strip). Main content area with grid of widgets. Gap-6 spacing to let background breathe.
dashboard.widgets: Stats cards (top), Charts (middle), Recent Activity lists (bottom).

visual_enhancers.glass_glow: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-white/0 via-white/40 to-white/0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500 pointer-events-none
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay at 2% opacity on the main background to reduce banding.

images.description: Graduation student symbolizing success and hope
Abstract network nodes representing AI matching

universal_guidelines: NEVER use default Tailwind blue-500. Use custom brand colors.
Glassmorphism requires a busy or gradient background to work. Never put glass on plain white.
Text inside glass cards must be high contrast (Slate-800 or Slate-900).
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
Ensure charts use the brand palette (Blue, Violet, Teal).
Add 'backdrop-blur-xl' to all overlays and sticky headers.
For file uploads, use a dashed border dropzone with a subtle bounce animation on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with brand colors and fonts.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Layout wrapper with the gradient mesh background.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build pages using the specified Grid Layouts (Bento for Home, Dense for Dashboard).
